A monumental, incredibly historic, and absolutely defining legislative victory completely altered the global economic architecture. This massive, heavily fought geopolitical maneuver officially ended decades of massive, conditional annual trade reviews. By permanently and aggressively opening the US market to Chinese goods, it heavily ensured Beijing's massive, impending entry into the WTO, fundamentally guaranteeing the massive, unstoppable offshoring of Western manufacturing and the aggressive rise of China as the absolute factory of the world.
